title: 2048 Legendary
description: 2048 is an addictive single-player sliding block puzzle game. The game's objective is to slide numbered tiles on a grid to combine them to create a tile with the number 2048. However, you can keep going to achieve the highest score possible!
instructions: Use your Arrow Keys or Swipe on the screen to slide the grid tiles. When two tiles with the same number touch, they merge into one with the double value! Aim for the 2048 block.

title: Hextris Neon
description: Hextris is a fast-paced, high-thrill puzzle game inspired by Tetris. The player must rotate an outer hexagon to capture falling blocks of corresponding colors. Prevent the gray bounding hexagon from overflowing!
instructions: Use Left and Right Arrow keys (or press screen sides) to rotate the central Hexagon. Match 3 or more blocks of the same color to delete them and earn points.

title: HexGL 3D Racer
description: HexGL is a futuristic 3D WebGL racing game prototype built with Three.js. Pilot a high-speed hovering spacecraft, avoid hitting the track borders, and set absolute speed records!
instructions: Use Up Arrow key (or W) to accelerate, Left/Right (or A/D) to steer, and Spacebar or Down Arrow to brake.

title: Clumsy Bird
description: Clumsy Bird is a vibrant open-source adaptation of the classic Flappy Bird adventure. Navigate a clumsy, flapping bird through vertical obstacles. Test your focus and perfect your coordination!
instructions: Press the Spacebar or Click the screen to flap your wings and fly upwards. Avoid the green columns to score!

title: Retro Minesweeper
description: The ultimate classic retro Minesweeper unblocked. Carefully deduce the locations of explosive mines hidden in a grid. Clear the board safely to show your analytical prowess!
instructions: Left-click a cell to reveal it. Right-click standard tiles to place flags on suspected mines. Use the numbers to count surrounding mines.

title: Outrun JS Racer
description: A high-fidelity outrun-style simulated 3D driving game. Experience curves, hills, visual sprites, and intense retro-fueled synthwave speeds directly from the 90's arcade era.
instructions: Use W/S or Up/Down arrow keys to accelerate and decerate. Use A/D or Left/Right arrows to steer your racing machine.

title: T-Rex Dino Runner
description: The famous offline browser T-Rex game is now completely unblocked! Run across a desert landscape dodging cactuses and flying pterodactyls to see how far you can survive.
instructions: Press the Spacebar or Up Arrow key to start the run and jump. Use the Down Arrow key to duck nested obstacles.

title: Space Invaders Legacy
description: Relive the golden age of arcade gaming with this fully featured retro Space Invaders shooter. Defend earth from waves of descending alien spaceships!
instructions: Use Left and Right arrow keys (or A and D) to move your laser cannon. Press Spacebar to open fire!

title: Astray 3D Maze
description: Astray 3D is a highly engaging WebGL maze escape action game developed with Three.js and Box2D. Roll a physics-controlled ball through complex structural labyrinths to locate the final escape portal.
instructions: Use W, A, S, D or the Arrow Keys to generate forces and steer the ball of light towards the flashing yellow exit zone.

title: Retro Canvas Snake
description: A responsive, distraction-free HTML5 grid-based Snake simulation. Steer your snake to eat high-value apples, grow as long as possible, and set the ultimate speed record.
instructions: Press any Arrow key to move. Avoid crashing your snake into the pixel walls or your own tail!

title: Classic Brick Tetris
description: The quintessential arcade block-fitting puzzle. Arrange falling geometric shapes (tetrominoes) into complete horizontal lines to score combos and prevent the stack from reaching the ceiling.
instructions: Use Left/Right arrows to move sideways, Up arrow to rotate, Down arrow to soft drop, and Spacebar to instantly drop.
